'''payufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocence|nocence]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocence|nocence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| payufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæyifith|pæyifith]] || [[word:pæyifij|pæyifij]] || [[word:pæyifish|pæyifish]] || [[word:pæyifi|pæyifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:payuyufuth|payuyufuth]] || [[word:payuyufuj|payuyufuj]] || [[word:payuyufush|payuyufush]] || [[word:payuyufu|payuyufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:payufuth|payufuth]] || [[word:payufuj|payufuj]] || [[word:payufush|payufush]] || [[word:payufu|payufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:payuffuth|payuffuth]] || [[word:payuffuj|payuffuj]] || [[word:payuffush|payuffush]] || [[word:payuffuf|payuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:payufuthu|payufuthu]] || [[word:payufuju|payufuju]] || [[word:payufushu|payufushu]] || [[word:payufuku|payufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:payufuth|payufuth]] || [[word:payufuj|payufuj]] || [[word:payufush|payufush]] || [[word:payufu|payufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:payufuthul|payufuthul]] || [[word:payufujul|payufujul]] || [[word:payufushul|payufushul]] || [[word:payufukul|payufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:payufuthuthu|payufuthuthu]] || [[word:payufujuju|payufujuju]] || [[word:payufushushu|payufushushu]] || [[word:payufuku|payufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:payufuthun|payufuthun]] || [[word:payufujun|payufujun]] || [[word:payufushun|payufushun]] || [[word:payufukun|payufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:payufuthuoro|payufuthuoro]] || [[word:payufujuoro|payufujuoro]] || [[word:payufushuoro|payufushuoro]] || [[word:payufukuoro|payufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
